title: dipdoop's Totally Awesome Pack
description: This pack contains some of my most random ideas, models, and much more.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/99000842feb07263b7a6b3575d3963ded02b06bb.png)
**This glorious pack adds a multitude of new random items, like the MrBeast diamond, or the almighty RTX 4090 as a netherite sword, and even raw iron as chicken nuggets.**

Join the discord for prereleases before they get added to modrinth.

(The MrBeast diamond image is not a real video, please don't sue me.)

Also check out [dipdoop's Totally Awesome Iron (Create Compat)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/dipdoops-totally-awesome-raw-iron-(create-compat))

![upcoming](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/94ce3d1085120e37724b1015e203136801e205a4.png)
- Cool sunglasses
- Metal rod
